parties: Rajapakse Arachchige Sanjeewa Subhash Rajapakse Vs. Belida Rachel Keegal. Rajapakse Arachchige Sanjeewa Subhash Rajapakse Vs. Belida Rachel Keegal. View More
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. Dissanayake, J
keywords: Preliminary objection on jurisdiction, that Appeal will not lie from the interlocutory order made by the High Court of the Province established by Article 154P(1) of the Constitution in the exercise of the of its appellate jurisdiction vested in it by Article 154P(3)(b) of the Constitution, but that Appeal should lie to the Supreme Court with special leave first had and obtained therefrom.
legistation: Constitution – Articles 138 and 154P(3)(b) -sections 2(1) and 14(2) of the Maintenance Act No. 37 of 1999.
